summary: Comprehensive testing of Telegram bot expansion features (Iteration 13). All 29 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend order tracker with polling verified working correctly - status updates reflected after Telegram callback.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/public/orders returns order with id field
Backend: POST /api/public/orders for preorder returns id and is_preorder=true
Backend: GET /api/public/orders/{order_id}/status returns order status
Backend: GET /api/public/orders/{invalid_id}/status returns 404
Backend: Order status is public (no auth required)
Backend: Status flow via admin API (new -> in_progress -> completed)
Backend: Status cancelled via admin API
Backend: Telegram webhook callback_query o_accept updates status to in_progress
Backend: Telegram webhook callback_query o_done updates status to completed
Backend: Telegram webhook callback_query o_cancel updates status to cancelled
Backend: Telegram webhook callback_query c_done marks staff call as completed
Backend: Telegram webhook handles invalid order ID gracefully
Backend: Telegram webhook handles /orders command
Backend: Telegram webhook handles /calls command
Backend: Telegram webhook handles /stats command
Backend: Telegram webhook handles /start command and subscribes user
Backend: POST /api/public/staff-calls returns call with id
Backend: POST /api/public/staff-calls with call_type_id works
Backend regression: Login works (admin/220066)
Backend regression: GET /api/restaurants works
Backend regression: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/categories works
Backend regression: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/menu-items works
Backend regression: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/labels works
Backend regression: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/tables works
Backend regression: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/settings works
Backend regression: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/analytics works
Backend regression: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/orders works
Backend regression: GET /api/restaurants/{id}/staff-calls works
Backend regression: GET /api/public/menu/{table_code} works
Frontend: Client menu page /menu/{tableCode} loads correctly
Frontend: Restaurant name, sections, categories displayed
Frontend: Menu items displayed with images and prices
Frontend: Add to cart button works
Frontend: Cart dialog opens with items
Frontend: Submit order creates order and returns id
Frontend: Order tracker appears after ordering with data-testid='order-tracker'
Frontend: Order tracker displays 3 steps (Принят/Готовится/Готов)
Frontend: Order tracker polls /api/public/orders/{id}/status every 5 seconds
Frontend: Order tracker reflects status change after polling
Frontend: Admin login with Russian placeholders works (Введите логин, Введите пароль)
Frontend: Admin dashboard loads with stats
Frontend: Admin orders page shows 3 tabs (Заказы, Предзаказы, Вызовы)
Frontend: WebSocket 'Онлайн' indicator visible
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DialogContent accessibility warning in console - consider adding Description or aria-describedby to cart/call modals
seed_data_creation: Test orders created during testing via POST /api/public/orders endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Telegram bot expansion fully implemented and tested. Key features verified: 1) POST /api/public/orders returns order with id, 2) GET /api/public/orders/{order_id}/status provides order status for client-side tracking, 3) Status flow works (new -> in_progress -> completed/cancelled), 4) Telegram webhook handles callback_query for inline button actions (o_accept, o_done, o_cancel, c_done), 5) Telegram commands /orders, /calls, /stats work, 6) Frontend order tracker at /menu/{tableCode} polls status every 5 seconds and reflects changes. WebSocket broadcast on order status update from admin panel verified in previous iteration. All backend APIs continue to work (regression passed).

inline_buttons: o_accept_{order_id} - Accept order, sets status to in_progress
o_done_{order_id} - Complete order, sets status to completed
o_cancel_{order_id} - Cancel order, sets status to cancelled
c_done_{call_id} - Complete staff call, sets status to completed
bot_commands: /orders - List active orders with inline buttons
/calls - List active staff calls with inline buttons
keyboard_builders: build_order_keyboard(order_id, status) - Returns inline keyboard for orders
build_call_keyboard(call_id) - Returns inline keyboard for staff calls

order_tracker_features_verified.auto_cleanup: Removed from localStorage after completed/cancelled, tracker hidden after 10s
